hero.title: 👋 Hello, I'm Kranthi Kumar
hero.subtitle: Data Engineering · Data Analytics · Salesforce Consultant

summary: I help organizations turn data into decisions. With over 5 years of experience delivering CRM, ETL, BI, and analytics solutions, I specialize in building scalable systems that drive performance, precision, and insight.
✨ Salesforce Development: Apex, Lightning Components, REST/SOAP APIs
✨ Data Engineering & Analytics: Python, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, Snowflake
✨ ETL & Cloud Platforms: SAP BODS, Informatica, AWS
📊 From designing relational databases to automating reporting workflows, I bring clarity to complexity — enabling faster decisions and measurable impact across nonprofit and enterprise sectors.

🌍 My work bridges the gap between raw data and strategic outcomes. Whether it's integrating platforms or cleaning messy datasets, I focus on delivering solutions that are accurate, efficient, and built to scale.
🚀 I’m passionate about using data to solve real-world problems, support mission-driven goals, and unlock growth through intelligent automation.

education.detail: M.S. in Information Systems · Aug 2023 – May 2025
B.E. in Electronics & Communication · Aug 2014 – Jun 2018
